purpose: Technical contract gate proving optional formal_step_id mapping works while legacy procedure games remain valid.

review_questions.question: Can procedure-game data optionally map steps to formal PV template steps?
review_questions.answer: A. Yes, 1 pilot procedure(s) map every game step to a PV template step.

review_questions.question: Can existing procedure-game data remain unmapped?
review_questions.answer: A. Yes, 1 legacy_unmapped proof record validates and remains runnable.

review_questions.question: Does this authorize student-facing PV projection or forced migration?
review_questions.answer: A. No, PV.4 only adds the optional contract and keeps publication/migration blocked.

acceptance_evidence.detail: 1 legacy unmapped procedure(s) continue to validate.
No references/machine PV procedure-game alignment registry exists.

blocked_scope: required migration of existing procedure-game data
